purpose: Establish persistent memory and context learning.
guidelines: Structured documentation (MD + JSON) for critical project state.
Dynamic context injection based on historical interactions.

implementation.storagePath: N/A (GesFer.Product.Front; frontend web). Client state via React Query and React Context (src/contexts/). Project memory via SddIA docs.
implementation.contextManagement: React Query (server state) + React Context (client state) + SddIA documentation (project knowledge).
